default_binding.STEP1_MISHAP_DETAIL: landing on his head like a silly hat
default_binding.STEP2_MISHAP_DETAIL: a flour mustache and flour eyebrows
default_binding.STEP3_CHASE_PATH: past the pantry and around the root cellar
default_binding.A_PRIZE2: Warm Buns for the Whole Burrow

slots.meaning: The child protagonist who bakes alongside the mentor.
slots.guidance: A single kid-relatable helper (name or role); eager, capable, learns by trying.

slots.meaning: The trusted elder who guides the hero through the whole activity, this skeleton's companion-equivalent role.
slots.guidance: Warm, patient, never a source of peril; corrects mistakes gently and celebrates every attempt.

slots.meaning: The whole cozy home/community world the day takes place in.
slots.guidance: A small, warm, bounded home world; wonder over dread; nothing frightening lives here.

slots.meaning: The short path the hero takes from waking up to the workshop.
slots.guidance: A safe, familiar passage the hero knows well.

slots.meaning: The specific room where the whole activity happens.
slots.guidance: Warm, homely, fully safe; the heart of the story's setting.

slots.meaning: The finished creation the whole recipe builds toward.
slots.guidance: A wholesome, shareable result of the day's activity, named as a plural/collective noun.

slots.meaning: The guiding instructions the mentor consults at each step.
slots.guidance: An old, well-loved keepsake prop; readable and simple.

slots.meaning: The small special item that ends up decorating the best result.
slots.guidance: A tiny natural or found keepsake, harmless to carry and handle.

slots.meaning: The heat source used to finish the creation.
slots.guidance: A safely supervised, homely heat source; never touched without the mentor.

slots.meaning: The signal that tells the hero the wait is over.
slots.guidance: A small, cheerful sound cue.

slots.meaning: The corridor connecting the home to the neighbors' doors.
slots.guidance: A safe, familiar shared passage.

slots.meaning: The first neighbor(s) who receive or admire the finished creation.
slots.guidance: A friendly, harmless neighboring character or pair.

slots.meaning: The second neighbor who receives or admires the finished creation.
slots.guidance: A friendly, harmless neighboring character, distinct from NEIGHBOR1.

slots.meaning: The comforting drink shared during the dough's resting break and at the teatime ending.
slots.guidance: A warm, wholesome, kid-appropriate drink.

slots.meaning: The sweet ingredient container used partway through the recipe.
slots.guidance: A wholesome sweet ingredient in its own container.

slots.meaning: The tool used to stir the ingredients together.
slots.guidance: A simple, safe hand tool a child can help hold.

slots.meaning: The mentor's signature accessory, echoed as one of the playful shapes.
slots.guidance: A distinctive, wearable accessory belonging to the mentor.

slots.meaning: The first tool/container the hero must fetch, at the bottom of a precarious stack.
slots.guidance: A sturdy, harmless container or tool.

slots.meaning: The precarious pile the first item is buried at the bottom of.
slots.guidance: A wobbly but harmless stack; falling is silly, never dangerous.

slots.meaning: The silly, harmless detail of the first mishap.
slots.guidance: Comedic and gentle; nothing is broken and nobody is hurt.

slots.meaning: The container holding the second, fine loose ingredient.
slots.guidance: An open, easy-to-reach container.

slots.meaning: The fine loose ingredient measured into the mix at this step.
slots.guidance: A soft, wholesome, edible dry ingredient.

slots.meaning: The small tool used to measure the second ingredient.
slots.guidance: A simple, safe measuring tool sized for a child's hands.

slots.meaning: The silly, harmless detail of the second mishap.
slots.guidance: Comedic and gentle; a messy but harmless little accident.

slots.meaning: The container holding the third ingredient and the special token.
slots.guidance: A charming container that also safekeeps the token.

slots.meaning: The small loose ingredient poured in at this step.
slots.guidance: A wholesome, edible, pourable ingredient.

slots.meaning: The short indoor route the hero runs to retrieve the token after the third mishap.
slots.guidance: A safe, familiar indoor route past known landmarks of the home.

slots.meaning: The playful, non-round shapes offered as the alternative to neat shaping.
slots.guidance: A short, whimsical list of fun shapes a child could make.

slots.meaning: Ending title: a quiet shared celebration with the mentor alone (completion).
slots.guidance: Warm, cozy, positive; names ending e_teatime.

slots.meaning: Ending title: sharing the finished creation with the whole community (success).
slots.guidance: Generous, celebratory, positive; names ending e_neighbors.

slots.meaning: Ending title: a proud, perfect result achieved through patience (success).
slots.guidance: Proud, tidy, positive; names ending e_perfect.

slots.meaning: Ending title: the playful, funny-shaped result turns out delicious (completion).
slots.guidance: Funny, delighted, positive; names ending e_funny.

slots.meaning: Ending title: the playful shapes become a new keepsake tradition (discovery).
slots.guidance: Warm, inventive, positive; names ending e_recipe.

slots.meaning: Ending title: the playful shapes delight the whole community (success).
slots.guidance: Joyful, communal, positive; names ending e_silly.
